Dragon Ball Z S.H.Figuarts Action Figure King Cold 22 cm  - Severely damaged packaging
products.description: King Cold, from Dragon Ball Z, joins S.H.Figuarts! Sculpted at a titanic 220mm size that's in scale with his appearance from the series, it features all of the articulation you've to expect from S.HFiguarts toy technology. Three optional expressions are included, letting you display with a scream, grimace, or sneer! Also includes an all new throne accessory. Use it with the S.H.Figuarts Mecha Frieza (sold separately) to re-create your favorite scenes!Set Contents:- Main Body- Three pairs of optional hands- Optional head·Three optional expressions - Crossed arm part- Trunks' sword- Throne- Optional cape

products.name: Dragonball Z Kai 66 Action Figures 7 cm Assortment (10)
Dragon Ball Super: Dragon Stars - Mystic Gohan Action Figure
products.description: Welcome the fierce battles of Dragon Ball into your world with these superior 6.5-inch Dragon Stars action figures. Finely crafted and intricately detailed with 16 points of articulation. This is the highest order of quality, and as close as you can get to the real thing. You can be the star of your own Dragon Ball battles, inspired by the show and limited only by your imagination.

products.name: Dragon Ball: Dragon Stars - Majin Vegeta Action Figure
Dragon Ball: 12 cm Action Figure Assortment (6)
products.description: With these 12 cm Action Figures the big Dragon Ball Battles can be fought.

products.name: Dragon Ball Figuarts ZERO PVC Statue Son Goku (mini) & Supreme Kai (mini) Welcome to the great Adventure! 23 cm
Dragon Ball Super: Broly Action Figure S.H. Figuarts Vegeta Super Saiyan Blue (15th Anniversary Version) 14cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Super: Broly Action Figure of Vegeta Super Saiyan Blue in S.H. Figuarts collection, size approx.14cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

Celebrating 15 years of S.H. Figuarts! SUPER SAIYAN GOD SUPER SAIYAN VEGETA - SUPER join the series in a special S.H.Figuarts 15th anniversary version! Featuring all the play value fans have come to expect from the series, it also lets you replicate "god mode!" More, it includes a special stand and packaging sleeve commemorating the 15th anniversary of the line.

Content :

  • Main Body
  • Two optional heads (SUPER SAIYAN GOD SUPER SAIYAN Version)
  • An optional head(SUPER SAIYAN GOD version)
  • Four right and three left optional hands
  • Optional crossed arms
  • S.H.Figuarts 15th Anniversary Stand

products.name: Dragon Ball Z Figure Figuarts ZERO Janenba (Janemba) (Extra Battle) 30cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Figure of Janenba in FiguartsZERO (Extra Battle) collection, size approx.30cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

"DRAGON BALL Z Fusion Reborn" was created in 1995 to mark the 15th anniversary of the series. Now the monstrous antagonist JANENBA joins the FiguartsZERO series! The statue is sculpted to capture a dramatic moment, with fine detailing and translucent accent parts!

Content :

  • Main Body(with stand)
  • Sword

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Super Saiyan 2 Son Goku Event Exclusive 13cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Action Figure of Super Saiyan 2 Son Goku in S.H. Figuarts collection, size approx.13cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

Reproduce his dogi clothes torn in the battle with Yakon in the anime series!

Also included are three facial expression parts, with a shouting face and clenched face in addition to the impressive grinning face!

On top of that, you could reproduce the electric shock effect specific to the Super Saiyan 2 state using the newly modeled effect parts included!

Content :

  • Main body
  • Exchangeable hand left/right x 4 types
  • Exchangeable expression parts x 3 types
  • Angel Halo part
  • Effect parts

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Shenron Event Exclusive 28cm (New)
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Action Figure of Shenron in S.H. Figuarts collection, size approx.28cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

Orange Piccolo from the movie Dragon Ball Super: SUPER HERO is now available from S.H.Figuarts!

The image from the movie is reproduced to the last detail, like the figure’s balance of the head and body, the buffed up muscles, and the creased look of the martial arts uniform! Three types of facial expression parts are included as accessories, including the face shouting when Piccolo confronts Cell Max.

Similarly to S.H.Figuarts Son Gohan Beast (sold separately), flexible parts are used for the martial arts uniform to achieve both appearance and mobility!

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Krillin Earth's Strongest Man 12cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Z action figure of Krillin in S.H. Figuarts collection,size approx.12 cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

From "Dragon Ball Z," the Earth's strongest man Krillin joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring all-new sculpting and articulation to better capture his dynamic on-screen appearance.

Krillin is very often shaved and does not have a nose. He is Goku's best friend and a brother-in-arms who fights alongside him many times. When he first appears, he's a surly teenager, but Muten Rôshi's training and life spent alongside Goku will help him grow wiser. He is originally quite a jealous and selfish person, so he does not respect Muten Rôshi's rules during his training. After a short rivalry with Son Gokû, he will become her best friend. Thanks to Son Gokû, he gradually becomes benevolent. In films mainly, Krillin is often used as a comic element. Although iconic and very strong, he is surpassed by many characters in the series, such as Piccolo or All Saiyans.

Contents:

  • Main Body
  • Six left and five right optional hands
  • Three optional heads
  • Slicing effect

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

products.name: Dragon Ball Super S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Android 17 (Universe Survival Saga) 14cm
products.description:
Dragon Ball Super action figure of Android 17 in S.H. Figuarts collection,size approx.14 cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

From the Universe Survival Saga of "Dragon Ball Super," the mighty Android 17 joins S.H.Figuarts! Standing 135mm tall and made of ABS and PVC plastic, you can display it in dynamic poses with the many included options and effect parts!

Android 17 is the 17th artificial human created by Doctor Gero to take revenge on Son Goku.

Twin brother of Android 18, he is one of the major antagonists of the Artificial Humans Saga before being absorbed by Cell. On the latter's death, N ° 17 is resuscitated thanks to the Dragon Balls and becomes an animal protector. Recruited years later by Son Gokû to participate in the Tournament of Power, he was the winner of the Super Dragon Balls and restored the 7 universes destroyed by Zen'Ô.

Complete the duo with Android 18 !

Contents:

  • Main Body
  • Four pairs of optional hands
  • Three optional expression parts
  • Optional hair part
  • Energy bomb effect
  • Attack effect

This product is not a toy or product for children. It is a collectors item intended for adults only.

For the first time in S.H.Figuarts, here is Goku Super Saiyan 4 from Dragon Ball GT.

In Dragon Ball GT, it was Son Goku who was the first to have the honor of taking advantage of the immense powers of this form of Super Saiyan 4 during his fight against Baby Vegeta. In this form, Super Saiyans' hair becomes longer and thicker. The body is then covered with thick red fur as well as on the tail, the eyes are also circled in red. This transformation is considered the most powerful of all.

products.description:
Dragon Ball Z Action Figure of Cooler Final Form in S.H. Figuarts collection, size approx.19cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.
"Well then... Ready to kneel?"
Cooler, from the fifth movie, Dragon Ball Z: Cooler's Revenge joins S.H.Figuarts! He stands approx. 19cm tall. Exchangable hand parts, exchangable feet, and face part without his mask is included! Made by Tamashii Nations.
Cooler is on the lookout for Son Goku not to avenge his brother Frieza, but to avenge the humiliation suffered by his family as a result of his being defeated by a Saiyan. Four henchmen face Son Gohan, Krillin, Son Goku and Piccolo but our heroes are quickly defeated. Goku recovered from a burn on his back thanks to a senzu set out in search of Cooler. Son Goku leads the fight and Cooler, in bad posture, transformed into his final form and gained the upper hand over his opponent who was unfortunately no match for him ...

Set Contents:
  • main body
  • an optional expression part
  • three pair of optional hand parts
  • a pair of optional feet

It is highly posable -- it even captures his special fighting pose -- and packed with key accessories, including the S.H.Figuarts series' first-ever Namekian-sized Dragon Ball! In keeping with his evil countenance, the set includes plenty of parts to let you recreate your favorite scenes. It also includes an extra head for the S.H.Figurarts Majin Buu -GOOD- figure (sold separately) to further enhance your display possibilities! This set includes two optional heads, three sets of optional hands, the optional Majin Buu -GOOD- head, and head effect parts.

products.description:
Dragon Ball Figure of Bulma's Motorcycle with Goku, size approx.17cm. Official product by Tamashii Nations.

From the first episode of "Dragon Ball", the bike on Bulma was riding appeared on S.H.Figuarts!

The roof panel and turn signal, head tale lamp are molded in translucent plastic. The frame, front fork, muffler, and footrests are all made of diecast metal, giving the bike a satisfying sense of weight. It even comes with a display stand featuring the Capsule Corp. logo. It also includes an in-scale Goku. Plus, the stand lets you pose the bike statically, as if riding, or popping a wheelie! The set includes the motorcycle, a stand set, optional skirt and  pair of optional hands(L/R) for S.H.Figuarts Bulma, and Non-movable Son Goku figure.

PROPLICA is a series of high-quality, life-sized replicas of fantastic gadgets and gear for discerning adult collectors, and this replica of the Dragonradar is the ultimate collectible for Dragon Ball fans! Click the button to trigger different display modes and realistic sound effects. Who knows -- maybe you'll find a Dragon Ball yourself! The set includes a stand and a carrying strap.

  Batteries included (3x LR44)
